violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets (dairy) were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the open-air case vents and shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC stated deep cleaning for refrigeration units has been scheduled for 2/25/26. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

The floors in the following area have an accumulation of debris: -under produce shelving -under shelving in walk-in freezer -corner near door to walk-in freezer. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the women's toilet room.. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings outside the walk in freezer door, and inside the walk in freezer near the door. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the open-air cases, curbside freezer, curbside refrigerators, plastic cart, and some market shelves have an accumulation of dust and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The floors and shelving in the walk in coolers, and shopping area has an accumulation of soil debris and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The area around the loading dock has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
